---
title: "Learning"
author: "Milaotou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: hide
    css: styles.css
---
# <span style="display: none;">设置代码块全局选项</span>{.unnumbered}
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	fig.height = 8,
	fig.width = 10,
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE,
	tidy = TRUE
)
library(rstudioapi)
setwd(dirname(getActiveDocumentContext()$path))
getwd()
```

# 加载包
```{r libraries}

```




```{r}

```

# Session info {.unnumbered}
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```


```{r}
#' 绘制极坐标棒棒糖图
#' 
#' @param data 数据框，包含以下列：group（分组）, gene（基因名）, value（数值）, label（标签，可选）
#' @param group_order 分组顺序，默认为NULL（按数据中的顺序）
#' @param colors 颜色向量，默认为c("#FF6B35", "#004E89")，第一个颜色为普通基因，第二个为共同基因
#' @param start_degree 起始角度，默认90度
#' @param gap_between_groups 组间间隙，默认2度
#' @param gap_after_last 最后一个组后的间隙，默认20度
#' @param track_height_lollipop 棒棒糖轨道高度，默认0.37
#' @param track_height_labels 标签轨道高度，默认0.08
#' @param show_labels 是否显示外圈标签，默认TRUE
#' @param show_links 是否显示内圈连线，默认TRUE
#' @param normalize_values 是否标准化数值，默认TRUE
#' @param point_size 点的大小，默认0.8
#' @param line_width 线条宽度，默认1
#' @param link_color 连线颜色，默认"#4e6a74"
#' @param text_size 文字大小，默认0.8
#' 
#' @return 无返回值，直接绘制图形
#' 
#' @examples
#' # 创建示例数据
#' example_data <- data.frame(
#'   group = rep(c("Disease A", "Disease B", "Disease C"), each = 5),
#'   gene = c("Gene1", "Gene2", "Gene3", "Gene4", "Gene5",
#'            "Gene1", "Gene6", "Gene7", "Gene8", "Gene9",
#'            "Gene2", "Gene10", "Gene11", "Gene12", "Gene13"),
#'   value = runif(15, 0.1, 1),
#'   label = c("Gene1", "", "", "", "",
#'             "Gene1", "", "", "", "",
#'             "Gene2", "", "", "", "")
#' )
#' plot_polar_lollipop(example_data)

plot_polar_lollipop <- function(data,
                                group_order = NULL,
                                colors = c("#FF6B35", "#004E89"),
                                start_degree = 90,
                                gap_between_groups = 2,
                                gap_after_last = 20,
                                track_height_lollipop = 0.37,
                                track_height_labels = 0.08,
                                show_labels = TRUE,
                                show_links = TRUE,
                                normalize_values = TRUE,
                                point_size = 0.8,
                                line_width = 1,
                                link_color = "#4e6a74",
                                text_size = 0.8) {
  
  # 加载必要的包
  if (!requireNamespace("circlize", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'circlize' is required but not installed.")
  }
  if (!requireNamespace("dplyr", quietly = TRUE)) {
    stop("Package 'dplyr' is required but not installed.")
  }
  
  library(circlize)
  library(dplyr)
  
  # 数据验证
  required_cols <- c("group", "gene", "value")
  if (!all(required_cols %in% colnames(data))) {
    stop(paste("Data must contain columns:", paste(required_cols, collapse = ", ")))
  }
  
  # 如果没有label列，创建空的label列
  if (!"label" %in% colnames(data)) {
    data$label <- ""
  }
  
  # 设置分组顺序
  if (is.null(group_order)) {
    group_order <- unique(data$group)
  }
  data$group <- factor(data$group, levels = group_order)
  
  # 数值标准化
  if (normalize_values) {
    data$y_pos <- (data$value - min(data$value, na.rm = TRUE)) / 
      (max(data$value, na.rm = TRUE) - min(data$value, na.rm = TRUE))
  } else {
    data$y_pos <- data$value
  }
  
  # 计算每个基因在其组内的x坐标和区间
  data <- data %>%
    group_by(group) %>%
    mutate(
      n_genes = n(),
      gene_index = row_number(),
      x_pos = (gene_index - 0.5) / n_genes,
      # 为基因创建区间（均匀分布）
      gene_width = 1 / n_genes,
      start = (gene_index - 1) / n_genes,
      end = gene_index / n_genes
    ) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  # 识别共同基因
  gene_counts <- table(data$gene)
  common_gene_names <- names(gene_counts[gene_counts > 1])
  # 添加共同基因到数据表
  data$label <- ifelse(data$gene %in% common_gene_names, data$gene, "")
  # 添加颜色列
  data$color <- ifelse(data$gene %in% common_gene_names, colors[2], colors[1])
  results_data <- data
  # 准备genomic格式的标签数据（只包含有标签的基因）
  genomic_labels <- data %>%
    filter(label != "" & !is.na(label)) %>%
    select(
      chr = group,
      start = start,
      end = end,
      name = label,
      color = color
    ) %>%
    # 确保数据类型正确
    mutate(
      chr = as.character(chr),
      start = as.numeric(start),
      end = as.numeric(end)
    )
  
  # 准备连线数据
  if (show_links) {
    common_genes <- data %>%
      filter(gene %in% common_gene_names) %>%
      select(group, gene, x_pos)
  }
  
  # 初始化circlize
  circos.clear()
  
  # 设置间隙
  n_groups <- length(levels(data$group))
  gaps <- c(rep(gap_between_groups, n_groups - 1), gap_after_last)
  
  circos.par(
    start.degree = start_degree,
    gap.after = gaps,
    track.margin = c(0, 0.01),
    cell.padding = c(0, 0, 0, 0)
  )
  
  # 初始化图形
  circos.initialize(factors = data$group, xlim = c(0, 1))
  
  # 添加外圈基因标签 - 使用circos.genomicLabels
  if (show_labels && nrow(genomic_labels) > 0) {
    circos.genomicLabels(
      genomic_labels,
      labels.column = 4,  # name列的位置
      facing = "reverse.clockwise",
      side = "outside",
      cex = text_size * 0.8,
      col = genomic_labels$color,
      connection_height = convert_height(4, "mm"),
      line_lwd = 0.5,
      labels_height = convert_height(8, "mm")
    )
  }
  
  # 添加分组标签轨道
  sector_bg_colors <- c("#FFDDC1", "#C1E1FF", "#D5FFD5", "#FFE1FF", "#B699FF")  # 与 levels(data$group) 数量一致
  circos.track(
    factors = data$group,
    ylim = c(0, 1),
    track.height = track_height_labels,
    bg.col = sector_bg_colors,
    panel.fun = function(x, y) {
      circos.text(
        CELL_META$xcenter,
        CELL_META$ylim[2] - 0.7,
        CELL_META$sector.index,
        facing = "bending.inside",
        cex = text_size,
        adj = c(0.5, 0)
      )
    }
  )
  
  # 绘制棒棒糖图
  circos.trackPlotRegion(
    factors = data$group,
    ylim = c(0, 1),
    track.height = track_height_lollipop,
    panel.fun = function(x, y) {
      sector_data <- data[data$group == CELL_META$sector.index, ]
      
      # 绘制每个基因的棒棒糖
      for (i in 1:nrow(sector_data)) {
        x_pos <- sector_data$x_pos[i]
        y_pos <- sector_data$y_pos[i]
        
        # 绘制线条（棒）
        circos.lines(
          c(x_pos, x_pos),
          c(0, y_pos),
          col = sector_data$color[i],
          lwd = line_width
        )
        
        # 绘制点（糖）
        circos.points(
          x_pos,
          y_pos,
          pch = 16,
          col = sector_data$color[i],
          cex = point_size
        )
      }
      
      # 在第一个扇区添加y轴
      if (CELL_META$sector.index == levels(data$group)[1]) {
        # y轴刻度
        y_at <- seq(0, 1, by = 0.2)
        circos.yaxis(
          side = "left",
          at = y_at,
          labels.cex = text_size * 0.9,
          tick.length = convert_length(2, "mm")
        )
        
        # y轴标题
        circos.text(
          CELL_META$cell.xlim[1] - convert_x(4, "mm"),
          0.5,
          ifelse(normalize_values, "Normalized Selection Score", "Selection Score"),
          facing = "reverse.clockwise",
          niceFacing = TRUE,
          adj = c(0.5, 0.5),
          cex = text_size
        )
      }
    }
  )
  
  # 添加共同基因之间的连线
  if (show_links && exists("common_genes") && nrow(common_genes) > 0) {
    for (gene in unique(common_genes$gene)) {
      gene_data <- common_genes %>% filter(gene == !!gene)
      
      if (nrow(gene_data) > 1) {
        # 为每个基因的所有出现位置绘制连线
        for (i in 1:(nrow(gene_data) - 1)) {
          for (j in (i + 1):nrow(gene_data)) {
            circos.link(
              gene_data$group[i], gene_data$x_pos[i],
              gene_data$group[j], gene_data$x_pos[j],
              col = paste0(link_color, "80"), # 添加透明度
              lwd = line_width * 0.8
            )
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
  
  # 添加图例
  legend(
    "bottomright",
    legend = c("Disease-specific", "Cross-disease"),
    fill = colors,
    cex = text_size * 0.9,
    bty = "n"
  )
  
  invisible(NULL)
}

# 辅助函数：创建示例数据
create_example_data <- function(n_groups = 4, genes_per_group = 6, common_genes_prop = 0.3) {
  set.seed(123)
  
  # 创建分组
  groups <- paste("Disease", LETTERS[1:n_groups])
  
  # 计算共同基因数量
  n_common_genes <- max(1, round(genes_per_group * common_genes_prop))
  n_unique_per_group <- genes_per_group - n_common_genes
  
  # 创建共同基因
  common_genes <- paste0("COMMON", 1:n_common_genes)
  
  # 构建数据
  data_list <- list()
  
  for (i in 1:n_groups) {
    group_name <- groups[i]
    
    # 为每组创建独特基因
    unique_genes <- paste0("GENE", i, "_", 1:n_unique_per_group)
    
    # 组合共同基因和独特基因
    group_genes <- c(common_genes, unique_genes)
    
    # 创建该组的数据
    group_data <- data.frame(
      group = group_name,
      gene = group_genes,
      value = runif(length(group_genes), 0.1, 1),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    # 为共同基因和部分独特基因添加标签
    # 共同基因：在所有组中都显示标签
    # 独特基因：每组随机选择1-2个显示标签
    group_data$label <- ""
    
    # 共同基因标签
    group_data$label[group_data$gene %in% common_genes] <- 
      group_data$gene[group_data$gene %in% common_genes]
    
    # 随机选择1-2个独特基因显示标签
    unique_indices <- which(group_data$gene %in% unique_genes)
    if (length(unique_indices) > 0) {
      selected_unique <- sample(unique_indices, min(2, length(unique_indices)))
      group_data$label[selected_unique] <- group_data$gene[selected_unique]
    }
    
    data_list[[i]] <- group_data
  }
  
  result <- do.call(rbind, data_list)
  return(result)
}

# 使用示例
 example_data <- create_example_data(n_groups = 5,genes_per_group = 21)
 # 查看数据结构
 head(example_data)
 table(example_data$label != "")  # 查看有多少基因有标签
# 绘图
plot_polar_lollipop(example_data)
write.csv(example_data, "plot_polar_lollipop_data.csv", row.names = FALSE)
df <- read.csv("plot_polar_lollipop_data.csv")
plot_polar_lollipop(df)

```

# Session info
```{r session-info}
sessioninfo::session_info()
```
